name: io.github.firas-mcp-servers/mcp-sql-bridge
title: MCP SQL Bridge
description: Read-only SQL MCP server for SQLite, PostgreSQL, and MySQL. Schema-aware, local-first.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_SQL_BRIDGE_DB_ALLOWED_DIRS
environmentVariables.description: Colon-separated list of directories that SQLite db_path values must be inside (security). Optional.
